name: athena-student-os
description: A desktop-environment-style productivity dashboard for students.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "bun run dev:server" "bun run dev:client"
scripts.build: bun run build:server && bun run build:client
scripts.typecheck: bun run typecheck:server && bun run typecheck:client
scripts.db:migrate: cd server && bunx prisma migrate dev
scripts.install:all: bun install && cd server && bun install && cd ../client && bun install
